metadata.__NOTE__: Runs daily at 10:00 AM. Set startDate to today's date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

parameters.__INSTRUCTION__: Connect your Google account and select the same spreadsheet used in Flujo 1

metadata.__NOTE__: Returns all rows where fecha_upsell = today AND upsell_enviado = No. If 0 results the scenario ends cleanly — normal on days with no check-ins in 3 days.

filter.name: Tiene telefono y upsell no enviado

mapper.__NOTE__: Sends as free-form text (no template needed) because the guest already has an active conversation from Flujo 1. If the 24h window has expired, 360dialog will return an error — see setup.md for the fallback template approach.

metadata.__NOTE__: Closes the anti-duplicate loop. After this update, the row will never be picked up again by the filter in module 2.

mapper.subject: ⚠️ Upselling no enviado — sin teléfono: {{3.Nombre}} (check-in {{3.Check-in}})
mapper.content:
El flujo de upselling pre-llegada no pudo enviar el WhatsApp a este huésped por falta de número de teléfono.

  • Nombre: {{3.Nombre}}
  • Check-in: {{3.Check-in}}
  • Habitación: {{3.Habitacion}}
  • Personas: {{3.Personas}}
  • ID reserva: {{3.ID_Reserva}}

Por favor, contactad manualmente con el huésped para ofrecerle los servicios adicionales.

__SETUP_NOTES__: PREREQUISITE: Flujo 1 must be active for at least 1 week with real reservation data in Sheets
1. Import this file via Make.com > Scenarios > ... > Import Blueprint
2. Search for all __FILL_IN__ placeholders and replace with real values
3. Same Google Sheets connection and spreadsheet as Flujo 1
4. Same 360dialog API key as Flujo 1 — no new WhatsApp account needed
5. Same Gemini API key as Flujo 1
6. Test by adding 3 manual rows in Sheets with fecha_upsell = today, then run manually
7. Confirm prices in the Gemini prompt match actual hotel prices before activating
8. Add columns upsell_convertido, upsell_servicio, upsell_importe to Sheets for ROI tracking
